{{Quote|I've never been too partial to Starfight. It's too much like work.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="HSR" />}}
'''''Starfight''''' was a coin-operated arcade game that consisted of two banks of monitors and controls. Between them was a [[Holoprojector/Legends|holotank]] with star charts. Each player sent their ships to battle one another in virtual space.<ref name="HSR" /> The holotank was rigged with sensory feedback, so that the players experienced the sensations of acceleration and battle damage. The game could also be played against a simulated computer player.<ref name="GSWU">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''</ref> Starfight consoles were available to patrons of [[The Free-Flight Dance Dome]] on [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]],<ref name="HSSE" /> aboard the [[Passenger liner/Legends|passenger liner]] ''[[Lady of Mindor]]'',<ref name="HSR" /> and in the amusement pavilion [[The Palace of Light]] on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]].<ref name="ML">''[[Mission to Lianna]]''</ref>
